[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Strelk''' was commanding officer of [[Training Camp IMIIF-138]] on [[Sirpar/Legends|Sirpar]]. He was of an aristocratic [[Senator/Legends|senatorial]] family, and hated Sirpar. He did his best to ignore his unit. He owned a luxury custom [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]], which was stolen by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Infiltrator (starfighter)|infiltrators]] who used it to get to the [[Nonessential Equipment Storage and Disposal Facility 456]] where vital [[Starship/Legends|starship]] parts were stored.
